title: Infinite genvar for-loop with always-true condition causes Icarus Verilog to hang indefinitely

features.name: genvar for-loop with always-true condition in generate block
features.description: Code should include a genvar for-loop in a generate block where the loop condition is always true and can never be satisfied

features.name: genvar loop variable with non-terminating increment
features.description: Code should include a genvar loop variable that increments without bound, combined with a condition that can never become false
features.snippet:
genvar i;
for (i = 0; i >= 0; i = i + 1)
